name: Lahti Towing & Sales
notes: Website https://www.lahtitowingandsales.com returned ECONNREFUSED - offline at time of extraction. CarGurus profile (https://www.cargurus.com/Cars/m-Lahti-Towing-Sales-Inc-sp337048) shows 0 active listings. Driverbase profile shows 0 vehicles. marketplace.apg-wi.com listed a single 'Volkswagen Vanagon' image with no details (circa 2018 post). Facebook page exists at facebook.com/LahtiTowingandSales/ but not accessible for scraping. Business is primarily a towing and full-service repair/body shop with occasional vehicle sales secondary; inventory is small and unlisted on all reachable aggregators at time of extraction.
